page_metadata.biotools__summary: SVM based method for prediction of promiscuous MHC class II binding peptides. The average accuracy of SVM based method for 42 alleles is ~80%. The performence of the method was poorer for few allele due to smaller size of dataset. The performence of the method was tested through 5-fold cross-validation.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SVM based method for prediction of promiscuous MHC class II binding peptides. The average accuracy of SVM based method for 42 alleles is ~80%. The performence of the method was poorer for few allele due to smaller size of dataset. The performence of the method was tested through 5-fold cross-validation.
